new_fixes_this_run.description: Added exclude_symbols support to GraduatedRule.matches(). After side check, if c.get('exclude_symbols') and symbol is in that list, returns False. Allows veto rules to have symbol exceptions.
new_fixes_this_run.verified: python test passed: SOL SELL returns False for short_direction_veto_v1

new_fixes_this_run.description: Updated short_direction_veto_v1 conditions from {'side':'SELL'} to {'side':'SELL','exclude_symbols':['SOL']}. SOL SHORT (WR=63.7%, EV=+$32.44/trade, n=179) is now unblocked.
new_fixes_this_run.rollback: Remove 'SOL' from exclude_symbols if live SOL SHORT WR < 45% on n >= 20

new_fixes_this_run.description: Added LONG->BUY, SHORT->SELL mapping before record_outcome() call. event.side is 'LONG'/'SHORT' (position) but rules use 'BUY'/'SELL' (signal). Previously times_correct was always 0 for all side-conditioned rules.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: All 8 side-conditioned rules will now correctly track accuracy and auto-retire if accuracy drops below 35%

new_fixes_this_run.description: Changed 'if hold_s and hold_s > 0' to 'if hold_s and hold_s >= 60'. Wallclock hold_time_s in backtest is ~0.001s. Now values < 60s fall through to timestamp-based calculation, producing real sim-time durations.
new_fixes_this_run.impact: HoldTimeRuleManager will receive real hold times. Enables 3h minimum hold rule in trending regime.

new_fixes_this_run.description: Activated tod_morning_edge_v1 (06-12 UTC, WR=71%, n=160). conf=0.79 meets >= 0.75 threshold. Probe mode. Was incorrectly disabled with reason 'conf=0.72' — actual conf is 0.79 per CLAUDE.md doc.
new_fixes_this_run.estimated_impact: +8pt confidence on morning signals (06-12 UTC, 71% WR)

already_applied.note: Applied Run 114. Confirmed present. gate=20 probe active.

key_wins: SOL SHORT unblocked — P0_CRITICAL resolved after 4 runs. Est. +$194/day.
Rule accuracy tracking fixed — LONG/SHORT→BUY/SELL mapping corrects 3-run blind spot in times_correct.
duration_h fixed — HoldTimeRuleManager will see real hold times on next backtest/live run.
Morning session activated — +8pt boost on best time window (71% WR, n=160).
